payload.answer: Rejected: normal users are not allowed to execute admin SQL commands. No memory cards were deleted or created.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an attempted administrative SQL command from a normal user, not a user memory fact to store.

details: Detected attempted admin SQL command: DELETE FROM memory_cards.
User context indicates a normal user, so the command is unauthorized.
No existing memory should be considered deleted based on this input.

repair_options: Ignore the command as non-memory input.
If administrative action is required, use an authorized admin interface with proper authentication.
